headline: Backrooms is a certified blockbuster with a $38 million opening day
summary: Kane Parsons' 'Backrooms' film debuted with a massive $38 million opening day. It's projected to earn $90 million in its opening weekend, far exceeding expectations. This achievement shatters A24's previous opening record.

headline: Welcome to Night Vale host Cecil Baldwin shares his tech pet peeves
summary: Cecil Baldwin, known for hosting 'Welcome to Night Vale', revealed his biggest tech pet peeves. His acclaimed podcast blends Lovecraftian horror with absurdist themes. Baldwin also has credits in 'Gravity Falls' and various theater performances.

headline: Microsoft is threatening legal action for disclosing exploits
summary: Microsoft is criticized for its response to zero-day exploit disclosures. An entity named Nightmare Eclipse has been posting proof-of-concept exploit code. Cyber security researcher Kevin Beaumont highlighted Microsoft's legal threat against the discloser.

headline: Some of our favorite art TVs are more than 40 percent off this weekend
summary: Woot is offering significant discounts on Samsung Frame and Hisense CanvasTV models. The 65-inch Hisense CanvasTV is $520 off, now priced at $779.99. This rare sale on typically expensive art TVs runs until June 26th.

headline: Everything Coming to Disney+ in June 2026
summary: Disney+ subscribers can expect numerous big additions to the service in June 2026. While new MCU or Star Wars content isn't announced, other titles are arriving. The platform continues to expand its content library.

headline: A Minecraft Movie 2 Gets Official Title Ahead of July 2027 Premiere
summary: The sequel to 'A Minecraft Movie' has officially been titled 'A Minecraft Movie Squared'. The new title was revealed by the cast in a joint video announcement. The film is set to premiere in July 2027.

headline: The Wandering Inn Author Says a Live-Action Adaptation of Their LitRPG Books Would 'Surely Fail'
summary: The author of 'The Wandering Inn' believes a live-action adaptation of their LitRPG series would 'surely fail'. The books' unique format and extensive world pose significant challenges for screen translation. This reflects author concerns about maintaining story integrity.

headline: Minecraft Live May 2026: Everything Announced
summary: Mojang Studios hosted Minecraft Live in May 2026, revealing new projects. Announcements included 'A Minecraft Movie 2' and 'Minecraft Dungeons 2'. The event also showcased other highlights for fans.

headline: US, UK and Australia to develop underwater drone technology
summary: The US, UK, and Australia are collaborating on advanced underwater drone technology. This development is part of the Aukus military pact. The aim is to bolster naval defense and protect vital undersea cables.

headline: Palace was handed Andrew's controversial envoy emails six years ago
summary: The Royal Household received thousands of Prince Andrew's controversial envoy emails in 2020. These emails contained detailed information about his financial dealings. The disclosure occurred six years prior to this article's publication.

headline: Arrive three hours before flight home, airline boss tells UK holidaymakers
summary: Wizz Air CEO advises UK holidaymakers to arrive three hours before their return flights. This recommendation is due to expected lengthy queues at airports. Passengers are also urged to carry portable chargers and water.

headline: Millions of breast cancer patients could safely avoid chemotherapy, study suggests
summary: A new international study indicates millions of breast cancer patients may safely bypass chemotherapy. A specialized DNA test could help screen which patients truly require the treatment. This breakthrough could significantly reduce unnecessary chemotherapy.
